subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim to the sacred Sepulchre! Render thanks unto God that thou hast traversed thousands of leagues and parasangs from thy familiar homeland [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر تربت مقدسه حمد کن خدا را که از وطن مالوف طی الوف فرسنگ و فراسخ نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
